source_pr.title: planner: fix the unstable test TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts/2
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #27328

Problem Summary: planner: fix the unstable test TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts/2

### What is changed and how it works?

No logical change, just refactor some unit tests.

The expected stats might not have been loaded after analyzing(see [here](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/statistics/handle/handle.go#L784)), so the original approach to check the stats by `show stats_xxx` may not be stable.

This PR updates the approach to use `TableStatsFromStorage`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note

```
